preregistration.hypothesis: 1. Shrinking volume_trend from 0.29 to 0.15 reduces recent decay. 2. Mild score-tilted allocation (inv-vol × exp(0.20×clip(z,-2,2))) converts selection advantage into higher realized returns.
preregistration.design: 2×2: factor weights (0.71/0.29 vs 0.85/0.15) × allocation (pure inv-vol vs score-tilted)

success_criteria.goal: Preserve ~+0.77pp pairwise return advantage over production while keeping median DD worsening ≤ +0.30pp and ≥ 2/3 consecutive 7-window time blocks with positive composite utility.
